titleStmt.title: SII 5.449: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 449. (A.R. No. 157 of 1894). This inscription is written in later characters and seems to be a copy. In writing it, the engraver has committed several mistakes. ON TWO PILLARS OF THE MANDAPA ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE LARGE SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyaṟ pāvai
yum cirtakac celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki(y) Iṉpurac camainta
ŪḻiuḷRead iṭaituṟaiº.Iṭaitaṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉameṟpaṭar vāraṇavāciyumRead vaṉavāci.cuḷ
ḷic cūḻmatuṭRead koḷḷippākkai.koppāṟkaiyum naṇṇaṟRead karuº.karimuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭaṟRead kaṭa līḻat.taraicartam perumuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyu
m maṉṉavarpakaṟRead muṉṉavarpakkalteṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=ti raṉmuṭiyum teṇ
ṭiraicūḻRead īḻa after cūḻ.maNTalamuzutum ERipaTaik koNTa muRaimaiyiR cUTikRead cūṭuṅ.kulata
ṉamāka maṇmakaḷ virumpac ceṅkatirvelait tol peruṅkāvil palapaḻan
ti(y)vum peruvaḷaṉeṭiy Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ
cāttimat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟt tiruttaku muṭi māpportaṇṭāṟ
koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentra coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu nāḷ
5 10Read aimpatiº.Aimmatiṉāl Atikārikaḷ piramma śrīkiḻār kiḻvempunāṭṭut tevatāṉam
tirunelvelik koyilil nittanimantama veṇṭuvaṉa celuttukaikku Ik
koyiṟkarumam Ārāyāviruntu tirunelvelittevaṟku tirumeyppūccukku veṇṭu
ṅ kaṟpūramum cantaṉamum Akilum tiruvamutukku veṇṭuṅ kaṭuku miḷaku mañcaḷum Aṭ
aikkāyum caṟkaraiyum Uppum Ittevar paṇṭārattuk kāciṭṭu vilaikku koṇ
ṭuvarukiṟapaṭi yāṇṭu 8vatu mutal tavirntu Ittevaṟku tirumeyppūccukku Orunāḷ
kaṟpūram Araikkaḻaiñcum meṟpaṭi Oru viḷakku Akil Eṇkaḻaiñcum meṟ
ppaṭi Orunāḷaikkuc cantaṉam nāṟpalamum tiruvamutukku Orunāḷaikku kaṭuku Āḻākkum me
ṟpaṭi Orunāḷaikku miḷaku Uḻakke Iruceviṭaraiyum meṟpaṭi Orunāḷaikku mā
ttāl ciṟappil kuṭimaiyāka peru
māṉaṭikaḻukku Iṟuttuvaruṅ kācu
Irupattiraṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu mutal Ivar
kaḷe yiṟuppārākavum Ivarkaḷ It
tevar nilattiliruntu maṉai tiṟai
maṉṟavāri yuḷḷiṭaṅkaḷum Itteva
r paṇṭārattu vaittuvaruṅ kācu pa
tiṉeṭṭum yāṇṭu 8vatu mutal t
evarpaṇṭārattu vaiyyātey I
varkaḷe yāṇṭu 8vatu mutal muta
le peṟavum Āka Ippaṭi tirunelve
li vaḷaiñceyaṟkuRead vaḷañciyaº.ittevar tevatāna
ṅ kaṇṇaṉūr nilaṅ kāṇiyākac
celvitākac celaka Eṉṟu AṇiyāriRead atikāri.
kaḷ veṭcikkiḻā reva Iva revi
ṉapaṭiye Atikārikaḷ kopparakeca
rimuven=ta veḷārum kaṭuvaṅkuṭai
yārum Uttamacoḻaviḻupparaiyarum
Ittevarkku ṣrikāriyañ cekiṉṟa kaṇa
kkaṅkuṭaiyā naṭikaṉaṅkaṉum It
tevar paṇṭārikaḷum civabrāhma ṇaṉ kecava
ṉ Īcaṉum malaināṭṭuk kumaran tāṉama
ṅkalattu nārāyaṇaṉ Iruṣikecavaṉu
m rājarāja maṇṭalattukku perumelūr
caṅkaraṉ kovintaṉum maṅkalattuk
koṟṟaṉ cāttaṉum coḻamaṇṭalattu śrī
kuṭantai(tta) caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉum tiruk
kaṭavūr centaṉ nakkaṉum puḷḷamaṅkalattu
Ātittaṉ mañcaṉum tirunallūr nārāya
ṇaṉum mutaṟkaṇakku kataṅkuṭaiyāṉ ko
ṟṟaṉum kaṇkāṇikkum paṭṭālakaṉcuntaraceRead cantaraº.
karaṉum Inta tirunelveli vaḷaiñceyar
Ittevar tevatānam kaṇṇaṇūr nilam A
ñce mukkālum Ittevaṟkku Iṟaiyi
liyāka veṭṭik kuṭuttatu .
Digital edition of SII 5.449 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
